# Example Workflow

This document demonstrates workflow functionality in the PVM documentation system.

## Overview

Workflows are step-by-step guides for common development tasks.

## Steps

1. Initialize project
2. Configure environment
3. Install dependencies
4. Start development
5. Run tests
6. Build and deploy

## Best Practices

- Follow the established patterns
- Use proper error handling
- Write comprehensive tests
- Document your changes

## Tips

- Use descriptive commit messages
- Keep changes focused and small
- Review code before merging
- Update documentation as needed

This workflow document helps test the categorization system.
